'''âth-j-f''' ('''kathajaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:neap|neap]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-j-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:neap|neap]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-j-f
|-
! Lemma
| kathajaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithajaf|thithajaf]] || [[word:jithajaf|jithajaf]] || [[word:shithajaf|shithajaf]] || [[word:kithajaf|kithajaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthajaf|thuthuthajaf]] || [[word:jujuthajaf|jujuthajaf]] || [[word:shushuthajaf|shushuthajaf]] || [[word:kukuthajaf|kukuthajaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthajaf|thuthajaf]] || [[word:juthajaf|juthajaf]] || [[word:shuthajaf|shuthajaf]] || [[word:kuthajaf|kuthajaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthajaf|thuthajaf]] || [[word:juthajaf|juthajaf]] || [[word:shuthajaf|shuthajaf]] || [[word:kuthajaf|kuthajaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethajaf|thethajaf]] || [[word:jethajaf|jethajaf]] || [[word:shethajaf|shethajaf]] || [[word:kethajaf|kethajaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothajaf|thothothajaf]] || [[word:jojothajaf|jojothajaf]] || [[word:shoshothajaf|shoshothajaf]] || [[word:kokothajaf|kokothajaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothajaf|thothajaf]] || [[word:jothajaf|jothajaf]] || [[word:shothajaf|shothajaf]] || [[word:kothajaf|kothajaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothajaf|thothajaf]] || [[word:jothajaf|jothajaf]] || [[word:shothajaf|shothajaf]] || [[word:kothajaf|kothajaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthajaf|thĂŠthajaf]] || [[word:jĂŠthajaf|jĂŠthajaf]] || [[word:shĂŠthajaf|shĂŠthajaf]] || [[word:kĂŠthajaf|kĂŠthajaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathajaf|thathathajaf]] || [[word:jajathajaf|jajathajaf]] || [[word:shashathajaf|shashathajaf]] || [[word:kakathajaf|kakathajaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathajaf|thathajaf]] || [[word:jathajaf|jathajaf]] || [[word:shathajaf|shathajaf]] || [[word:kathajaf|kathajaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathajaf|thathajaf]] || [[word:jathajaf|jathajaf]] || [[word:shathajaf|shathajaf]] || [[word:kathajaf|kathajaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathajaf|shathajaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathajaf|goshathajaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathajaf|gokishathajaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathajafnĂŒ|shathajafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathajafnknĂŒ|goshathajafnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathajafnĂŒ|gokishathajafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathajafshĂ«|shathajafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathajafnkshĂ«|goshathajafnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathajafshĂ«|gokishathajafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathajafro|shathajafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathajafnkro|goshathajafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathajafro|gokishathajafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathajafmu|shathajafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathajafnkmu|goshathajafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathajafmu|gokishathajafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathajafsher|shathajafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathajafnksher|goshathajafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathajafsher|gokishathajafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathajafng|shathajafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathajafnkng|goshathajafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathajafng|gokishathajafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathajafya|shathajafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathajafnkya|goshathajafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathajafya|gokishathajafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathajafyam|shathajafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathajafnkyam|goshathajafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathajafyam|gokishathajafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathajafnĂŒshĂ«|shathajafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathajafnknĂŒshĂ«|goshathajafnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathajafnĂŒshĂ«|gokishathajafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathajafnĂŒro|shathajafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathajafnknĂŒro|goshathajafnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathajafnĂŒro|gokishathajafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathajafnĂŒmu|shathajafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathajafnknĂŒmu|goshathajafnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathajafnĂŒmu|gokishathajafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathajafshĂ«nĂŒ|shathajafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathajafnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshathajafnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathajafshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishathajafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathajafshĂ«ro|shathajafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathajafnkshĂ«ro|goshathajafnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathajafshĂ«ro|gokishathajafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathajafshĂ«mu|shathajafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathajafnkshĂ«mu|goshathajafnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathajafshĂ«mu|gokishathajafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathajafronĂŒ|shathajafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathajafnkronĂŒ|goshathajafnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathajafronĂŒ|gokishathajafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathajafroshĂ«|shathajafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathajafnkroshĂ«|goshathajafnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathajafroshĂ«|gokishathajafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathajafromu|shathajafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathajafnkromu|goshathajafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathajafromu|gokishathajafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathajafmunĂŒ|shathajafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathajafnkmunĂŒ|goshathajafnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathajafmunĂŒ|gokishathajafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathajafmushĂ«|shathajafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathajafnkmushĂ«|goshathajafnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathajafmushĂ«|gokishathajafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathajafmuro|shathajafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathajafnkmuro|goshathajafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathajafmuro|gokishathajafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|806ef69}}
